title: Livestock Count
description: Print a table that describes the current count of all your livestock.
output: Print the table below as shown. The character “-”, is a dash not an underscore.

samples.output:
Animal      Count
-----------------
Chickens      100
Clydesdales     5
Cows           40
Goats          22
Steers          2

source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2017, Novice
